title: ButcherExtension
description: Abstract layer for butchercraft addon developement
body:
## Butcher Extension

**Butcher Extension** is a lightweight extension mod designed to expand and adapt **Butchercraft** mechanics for additional mobs and modded ecosystems.

It focuses on adding compatibility layers, extended carcass definitions, and data-driven hooks without altering Butchercraft’s core gameplay loop.  
No new systems are introduced — this mod exists to make integration cleaner, safer, and more flexible for downstream content.

Built with modpack stability and extensibility in mind.
